raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Arrival check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Lets Elena set the frame before any observation or concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reorg aftereffects","name":"What's felt different in your day-to-day since the reorg?","description":"Surfaces the concrete ways the transition has changed her experience without assuming the cause.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Forum pullback","name":"What changed for you in the leadership forums?","description":"Gives her room to explain the pullback in a specific setting rather than treating it as a general problem.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Transition load","name":"Where is the reorg adding the most load for you right now?","description":"Tests whether the issue is temporary transition strain, and where it is showing up operationally.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope fit","name":"What part of your current scope feels most in sync with how you want to spend your time?","description":"Checks whether the current shape of the role still matches her priorities and energy.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff reset","name":"What have you been saying no to since the reorg?","description":"Surfaces deliberate deprioritisation and whether the tradeoffs are clear or too costly.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What kind of support would actually make this week easier for you?","description":"Invites a concrete ask so the manager can respond to the real constraint instead of guessing.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"Where would you want me to step in more directly?","description":"Clarifies whether she needs air cover, decisions, introductions, or time from the manager.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery plan","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier?","description":"Ends with a practical landing point that turns the conversation into near-term commitments.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next focus","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to tackle first?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into a clear next step without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
